notes: Prices scraped from studio websites. 'verified: true' means prices were found on the website. 'verified: false' means prices could not be confirmed online.

yoga-in-der-altstadt-st-gallen.notes: Website returned 403 Forbidden. Pricing not accessible.

studio-8-st-gallen.notes: Stundenplan/Preise page referenced but not accessible. Pricing handled via SportsNow.

bubble-yoga-st-gallen.notes: Pricing page exists with drop-in, class packs, monthly memberships (50% off 1st month promo). Prices rendered dynamically, not extractable. Eversports booking.

rach-yoga-st-gallen.notes: Trial class confirmed at 20 CHF. Full pricing on Momoyoga booking platform, not extractable.

lineupyoga-st-gallen.trial_note: 2-class intro package valid 1 month. Also: single trial 60min 18, 75-90min 25
lineupyoga-st-gallen.notes: Drop-in 60min 28, 75-90min 35. 10er 60min 250 (4 months), 75-90min 330. 20er 60min 460 (8 months), 75-90min 610. Trial 2-class pack 40 (1 month). Single trial 60min 18, 75-90min 25.

123-yoga-st-gallen.trial_note: Trial lesson available, contact via phone 0762019727
123-yoga-st-gallen.notes: Single 30. 5er Karte 125. 10er Karte 200. No monthly subscription - card system only.

power-yoga-st-gallen.notes: Website returned 403 Forbidden. Pricing not accessible.

yogaloft-rapperswil-jona.notes: Single 60min 30, 90min 40. 10er 60min 240, 90min 340. 6-month unlimited 850. Trial 3 classes 85. Private/therapy 140/60min. Discounts: -2 single, -20 10er, -50 6-month for students/pensioners/unemployed. First lesson free.

hot-yoga-4-u-rapperswil.notes: 10er Karte 275 CHF. Trial class 25 CHF (since Jan 2026, previously free). First 10er card can be bought at 250 if trial cost credited.
